# Ticket Template

## Title

Short, outcome-oriented ticket title.

## Objective

What must be true when this ticket is done?

## Background

Relevant context only.

## Scope

What is included?
What is excluded?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Inputs

- linked artifacts
- linked tickets
- constraints

## Expected Outputs

- artifact(s)
- structured result
- follow-up recommendation if needed

## Owner

- owner type
- owner ID or worker type

## Dependencies

- dependency 1
- dependency 2

## Risks / Blockers

- known risk 1
- blocker 1

## Notes for Orchestrator

Why this ticket exists and how it fits the parent goal.
